results.rendered_html:
anāman a.
1 Nameless.
2 Infamous.
— m.
1 ‘The nameless’ month, an intercalary month.
2 The ring finger; see anāmikā below.
— n. [ ananamanaḥ, anaṃ jīvanaṃ amayati rujati, am-kanin  Tv. ] Piles (arśoroga).
